assertions.title: CLI to MCP Parity

steps.action: status: CLI and MCP report the same host status
steps.expected: Named Vitest step passes in the targeted E2E file.

steps.action: pull: CLI and MCP produce the same pull outcome and HEAD
steps.expected: Named Vitest step passes in the targeted E2E file.

steps.action: activate: CLI and MCP produce identical activation state
steps.expected: Named Vitest step passes in the targeted E2E file.

steps.action: deactivate: CLI and MCP produce identical deactivation state
steps.expected: Named Vitest step passes in the targeted E2E file.

steps.action: idempotent activate: both CLI and MCP report alreadyInState for already-active skill
steps.expected: Named Vitest step passes in the targeted E2E file.
steps.observed: Failed in `npm test -- parity.test.ts`; `e2e-polish/e2e-parity-error/parity.stderr.txt` shows `AssertionError: expected false to be true` because `cliHost!.alreadyInState` was `false`.

steps.action: idempotent deactivate: both CLI and MCP report alreadyInState for not-active skill
steps.expected: Named Vitest step passes in the targeted E2E file.

steps.action: state consistency: CLI and MCP see the same HEAD after sequential pulls
steps.expected: Named Vitest step passes in the targeted E2E file.

evidence.stderrSummary: AssertionError in `idempotent activate: both CLI and MCP report alreadyInState for already-active skill`: expected false to be true.

assertions.issues: `idempotent activate: both CLI and MCP report alreadyInState for already-active skill` failed because the CLI result reported `alreadyInState=false` for an already-active skill, so CLI/MCP parity was not preserved.

steps.action: CLI status: SSH failure is detected and reported with human-readable error
steps.expected: Named Vitest step passes in the targeted E2E file.

steps.action: MCP fleet_status: returns structured error with isError and error fields
steps.expected: Named Vitest step passes in the targeted E2E file.

steps.action: CLI pull: SSH failure propagates with preserved error context
steps.expected: Named Vitest step passes in the targeted E2E file.

steps.action: MCP fleet_pull: returns structured error with per-host failure detail
steps.expected: Named Vitest step passes in the targeted E2E file.

steps.action: CLI rollback: SSH failure on unreachable host preserves error context
steps.expected: Named Vitest step passes in the targeted E2E file.

steps.action: MCP fleet_rollback: returns structured error for unreachable host
steps.expected: Named Vitest step passes in the targeted E2E file.

steps.action: CLI activate: SSH failure propagates with error context
steps.expected: Named Vitest step passes in the targeted E2E file.

steps.action: MCP fleet_activate: returns structured error for unreachable host
steps.expected: Named Vitest step passes in the targeted E2E file.

steps.action: CLI deactivate: SSH failure propagates with error context
steps.expected: Named Vitest step passes in the targeted E2E file.

steps.action: MCP fleet_deactivate: returns structured error for SSH failure
steps.expected: Named Vitest step passes in the targeted E2E file.

steps.action: CLI status with mixed hosts: reachable host succeeds, unreachable reports error
steps.expected: Named Vitest step passes in the targeted E2E file.

steps.action: MCP fleet_status with mixed hosts: returns partial success with per-host error detail
steps.expected: Named Vitest step passes in the targeted E2E file.

steps.action: error parity: CLI and MCP report comparable error messages for same SSH failure
steps.expected: Named Vitest step passes in the targeted E2E file.

steps.action: MCP fleet_pull with mixed hosts: good host succeeds, bad host reports error
steps.expected: Named Vitest step passes in the targeted E2E file.

steps.action: error messages are actionable: no raw stack traces or Effect internals
steps.expected: Named Vitest step passes in the targeted E2E file.

summary: Tested 2 assertions via serial Vitest E2E runs: VAL-CROSS-005 failed (6/7 named steps passed; idempotent activate parity failed), and VAL-CROSS-007 passed (15/15 named steps passed).
